title: Ohara Defies the Government
description: Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.
scene: Across pages 4, 5, 6, 7, this part follows Spandam, Nico Robin, Nico Olvia, Professor Clover, Jaguar D. Saul. Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: I've always wanted to do this.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: it's all my fault... Nico Robin...!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: if only i had known THIS sooner...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... I... I really wanted...

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: It's not an easy thing to do...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I'm so proud of you, Nico Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: You shouldn't waste your time here.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: OLVIA... Run away with Nico Robin!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: ye'r here!! I was lookin' for ya!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: So, ya found Olivia, too, huh!!?

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Jaguar D. Saul....!! Why are you

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Take care of Nico Robin for me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: We've finally met...!! I'm staying here, too!!!

summary: Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.
